author: lemon695
description: Creates missing linked files and detects missing wiki links.

manifest.author: Lemon695
manifest.description: Creates missing linked files and detects missing wiki links.
manifest.name: Missing Link File Creator

name: Missing Link File Creator

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
🚀 New Features
- Active File Side View: Added a dedicated sidebar view that detects and displays missing links in the current file in real-time.
- Independent Ignore List: Moved the ignore list to independent storage to improve performance and stability for large vaults.

✨ Improvements & Refactor
- Mobile Compatibility: Fixed an issue where the plugin failed to install/update on iOS/Android due to version mismatch and redundant dependencies.
- Type Safety: Major refactor to eliminate any types and improve overall codebase robustness.
UI & i18n: Optimized internationalization implementation and semantic CSS class names.

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
fix(ui): Synchronize modal width settings to eliminate whitespace

Fixed layout issue where rule management modal showed ~3cm whitespace on the right side.

Changes:
- CustomModal: Changed max-width from 1200px to 1400px
- styles.css: Unified all modal max-width values to 1400px

Root cause: Width mismatch between outer .modal container (1400px) and inner .modal-content (1400px)
Result: Both containers now align at 1400px, following Material Design principles

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Lemon695/obsidian-missing-link-file-creator/compare/1.0.10...1.0.11

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
### 🚀 Features

* **Add Vault-Wide Scanning:** Introduces a new command, "Scan Entire Vault and Create Missing Files." You can now scan your entire vault at once to batch-create all missing notes, rather than doing it manually or folder by folder.

### 🐛 Fixes & Improvements

* **Fix Frontmatter Rule Saving:** Fixed a critical bug where matching rules based on "Frontmatter" would incorrectly revert to "Filename" rules after saving. This setting now saves correctly.
* **Optimize Path Suggestion Dropdown:** Reworked the path suggestion dropdown for better usability:
    * **Increased Width:** Max-width increased from 180px to 800px, making long paths fully visible.
    * **Optimized Positioning:** Changed placement to `bottom-end` (expands leftward) to prevent the menu from going off-screen.

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
### Fixes
- Fixed CSS conflict between plugin styles and Obsidian's native Wiki link search functionality
- Optimized dropdown selector style rules to avoid affecting Obsidian's built-in dropdown components
- Ensured plugin styles only apply to the plugin's own components without interfering with core functionality

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
### New Features

- **Rule System**: Create rules to automatically organize files in specific folders based on filename patterns
- **Template Support**: Apply templates to new files with Templater integration
- **File Preview**: See file content before creation
- **Auto-Tagging**: Automatically suggest tags for new files based on content
- **Enhanced Alias Handling**: Better management of aliases with template integration
- **Context Menu**: Right-click on selected unresolved links to create files

### Compatibility & Requirements

- Optional but enhanced experience with Templater plugin

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
- Folder Filtering: Added search filtering functionality to the default path setting, allowing users to quickly locate desired folders.
- Enhanced Folder Selection UI: Implemented real-time folder search filtering with intuitive dropdown selection and keyboard navigation.
- Improved User Experience: Added search icon and visual feedback with appropriate messaging for no results.

releases.author: Lemon695
releases.description:
- Enhanced link parsing to support multiple link formats
  - Standard internal links [[filename]]
  - Links with aliases [[filename|alias]]
  - Links with paths [[path/to/filename]]
  - Embedded links ![[filename]]
  - Links in resource directories [[resources/books/filename]]
  
- Added interactive file creation dialog
  - Support for batch selection of files to create
  - Implemented pagination for better handling of numerous links
  - Added select all/deselect functionality
  
- Alias management features
  - Support for adding multiple aliases to the same file
  - Detection and merging of different link references to the same file
  - Automatic addition of aliases to file frontmatter

- UI improvements
  - Optimized experience for both mobile and desktop devices
  - Added progress indicators and operation result display
  - Support for canceling operations
